description_long: This warehouse is a large, rectangular building set into a sloped, grassy terrain, with a dark, pitched roof and a combination of concrete and metal exterior walls. The front features a prominent entryway with a set of stairs and a ramp, as well as a patterned arrangement of steps and platforms leading up to the main doors. The sides of the building are mostly solid, with minimal windows and a utilitarian appearance, while the rear and one side show additional access points and possible loading areas. The roof is a simple, dark gabled structure with no visible skylights or rooftop equipment. The surrounding terrain is landscaped with grass, and the building is partially embedded into a black, cutaway base, suggesting a section of earth. The overall design is functional, with an emphasis on accessibility and straightforward industrial use.
description: A large, rectangular warehouse with a dark gabled roof, concrete and metal walls, and a prominent entryway with stairs and ramps set into grassy terrain. The design is utilitarian, with minimal windows and a focus on accessibility and industrial function.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, dark gabled roof, grassy terrain, and the building's solid, windowless wall.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, stairs, ramp, and patterned steps leading to the doors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying additional access points and the continuation of the gabled roof, with some visible platforms.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the building, the sloped terrain, and the simple roofline with minimal features.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a broad entryway with a set of stairs and a ramp, flanked by concrete and metal wall panels. The exterior is largely unadorned, with a focus on functional access and minimal decorative elements.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is a simple, dark gabled structure made of metal or asphalt, with no visible skylights or rooftop equipment.
